# ThirdParty

Everything under `ThirdParty/` is vendored upstream source. Do not modify
these files in place. If a change is required, either upstream the fix or
re-vendor at a new commit and record it in the module's `VENDORING.md`.

## Modules

- **Peertalk** - see [Peertalk/VENDORING.md](./Peertalk/VENDORING.md)
